headline: Howmet Aerospace Adds Legal Chief As Soaring Stock Draws Valuation Scrutiny
summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) has appointed Jonathan Arena as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer and Secretary. Arena joins the Executive Leadership Team, bringing extensive legal and compliance experience from major aerospace and defense organizations. For investors tracking Howmet Aerospace at a share price of $255.69, this leadership change comes alongside recent stock performance, with the shares up 1.2% over the past week, 10.6% over the past month and 20.8%...
